text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "notepad.exe is loading numerous PowerShell and .NET related DLLs, writing and deleting temporary PowerShell script files (e.g., __PSScriptPolicyTest_*.ps1), and creating a PSHost named pipe. This behavior is highly unusual and indicative of PowerShell execution, which is not a normal function of notepad.exe.",
  "indicators": [
    "powershell activity",
    "unusual DLL loads",
    "temp file creation",
    "named pipe creation",
    "process masquerading/injection"
  ]
}
